Author: Akari
Name: FC Tracker
Punchline: Track your characters' Free Companies: level, tag, credits, house, and workshop vessels.
Description:
Records, per character, the Free Company you belong to and its details. Open with /fctracker (alias /fct).

- Per-character table: character (with server), FC name, tag, level, house owned (Yes/No), submarines (Yes/No/N-A), and FC credits. Click any column header to sort; click a row to expand its full details below.
- Captures FC name, tag, level, current master, member counts, and FC credits (credits are read from the FC window and then persist, updating when you reopen the window).
- House checker: shows whether the FC owns an estate and, if so, the district, ward, plot, and world. Works anywhere, not just at the house.
- Workshop vessels: airships and submersibles with their rank and build shorthand (e.g. SSUC++), captured while standing in the FC workshop.
- First Registered date per character (first time the plugin saw you in the FC), plus editable manual notes for founder / house-winner info the game does not expose.
- Optional shared storage so all clients on the same Windows user share one dataset, regardless of --roamingPath, with multi-client-safe merging.
- Import existing data from AutoRetainer and Submarine Tracker.
